variants.q1_object_only: Object and overlap become object=0; all other pixels become background=255.
variants.q2_strict_affected: Object preserved; affected region rebuilt from high-threshold abs(V_obj - V_bg).
variants.q3_broad_affected: Object preserved; affected region rebuilt from lower-threshold abs(V_obj - V_bg).

visual_review.notes: All 8 evidence sheets were opened as a montage. Q1 is clean object-only; Q2 is the best conservative affected candidate; Q3 is useful diagnostic broad affected but riskier on REAL texture/lighting spill.
